title: Cranberry Butter Rolls
description: Sweet and flaky rolls filled with a tangy cranberry butter, perfect for a snack or breakfast.
instructions: 1. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
2. Roll out the dough for the rolls to about 1/4-inch thickness.
3. In a small bowl, mix together the cranberry and softened butter until well combined.
4. Spread the cranberry butter mixture evenly over the dough, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
5. Roll the dough into a tight log, starting from the long side.
6. Cut the log into 8-10 equal pieces.
7. Place the rolls onto the prepared baking sheet, leaving about 1 inch of space between each roll.
8. Bake for 15-20 minutes, or until the rolls are golden brown.
9. Allow the rolls to cool for 5 minutes before serving.
